articles.author: Dan Mangan
articles.title: Epstein victims to get $72.5M from Bank of America settlement - cnbc.com
articles.description: The settlement by Bank of America comes nearly three years after JPMorgan Chase and Deutsche Bank settled similar lawsuits by victims of Jeffrey Epstein.
articles.content: Bank of America has agreed to pay victims of notorious sex offender Jeffrey Epstein $72.5 million to settle a class action lawsuit alleging that the bank facilitated his sex trafficking operation, a … [+3862 chars]

articles.author: Kelly Tyko
articles.title: Trump's name is headed to dollar bills as cash use continues to decline - Axios
articles.description: President Trump's signature is set to appear on U.S. currency — a first for a sitting president — just as Americans are using cash less than ever.
articles.content:
Driving the news: The Treasury Department plans to put Trump's signature on all new U.S. paper currency, tied to the nation's 250th anniversary in 2026.
<ul><li>Traditionally, U.S. bills carry the s… [+1466 chars]
